title: Dave Grusch On Bob Lazar
summary: A brief exchange where Jesse Michels asks Dave Grusch about his opinion on Bob Lazar, a figure who claimed to work at a secret facility called S4 at Area 51. Grusch explains he has no insider information on Lazar and did not investigate his claims.

key_claims.claim: Bob Lazar claimed to have worked at S4, a top secret compartmentalized part of Area 51
Dave Grusch has no information on Bob Lazar beyond what is publicly known
Dave Grusch did not have the appropriate investigative privileges to look into Bob Lazar
